benchmark_cmd: benchmark_serving.py --model /home/models/models--DeepSeek-R1-0528 --port 8888 --backend openai --input-len 1024 --output-len 8192 --random-range-ratio 0.8 --num-prompts 40 --max-concurrency 4 --num-warmups 8 --result-filename result_fp8_latency_reasoning_ep1_c4 --result-dir ./results_b200_fp8_mtp3 --metadata max_model_len=10240 kv_cache_dtype=fp8 kv_cache_free_mem_fraction=0.8 tensor_parallel_size=8 ep_size=1 dp_attention=false moe_backend=TRTLLM mtp_layers=3 piecewise_cuda_graphs=false random_range_ratio=0.8 --use-chat-template
config_yaml:
cuda_graph_config:
    enable_padding: true
    max_batch_size: 4
enable_attention_dp: false
print_iter_log: true
kv_cache_config:
    dtype: fp8
    free_gpu_memory_fraction: 0.8
    enable_block_reuse: false
stream_interval: 10
moe_config:
    backend: TRTLLM
speculative_config:
    decoding_type: MTP
    num_nextn_predict_layers: 3
return_perf_metrics: true
perf_metrics_max_requests: 140
